claim: p_{n+1}q_n - p_n q_{n+1} = (-1)^n for the convergents of q_n=b_n q_{n-1}+q_{n-2} (discrete Wronskian flips sign each step).
evidence: Lean: casoratian_step, casoratian_eq, pq_casoratian. Clean axiom cone via #print axioms (no sorryAx).

claim: R_n -> R_infinity exists by monotone-bounded convergence for the scaled recurrence r_{n+2}=r_{n+1}+u_{n+2} r_n, u>=0.
evidence: Lean: rseq_ge_one, rseq_mono, rseq_le_rmaj, rseq_bddAbove_of_rmaj, rseq_tendsto_of_rmaj_bddAbove. Clean cone.
conditional: partial products bounded above (sum u_n < infinity)

evidence: Lean: psum, rseq_ge_one_add_psum, rmaj_mul_one_sub_psum_le_one, rinf_bracket, rseq_tendsto_under_psum_bdd. Clean cone. Gate: bracket_gate.py.
conditional: sum u_n < infinity and S = sup_n S_n < 1

claim: R_n = R_{n-1} + u_n R_{n-2}, u_n=1/(b_{n-1}b_n)>0; (R_n) strictly increasing, bounded by prod(1+u_k), R_inf-R_n = O(1/n^3).
evidence: Lemma 1, complete elementary hand proof. Finitary core formalized (see rinf-exists).

claim: R_n is the independence polynomial of the path graph on {2..n} at weights u_i; R_inf = sum_k sigma_k, sigma_k <= S^k.
evidence: Proposition (indpoly), hand proof by the same recurrence + base cases. Exact DP check: continuant_verify.py.

claim: S = -sum_rho Res_rho psi(2-rho) (distinct poles); confluent polygamma form at repeated poles; S(1,2,1)=pi^2/3-13/4.
evidence: Proposition (S). Hand derivation via polygamma series (DLMF 5.15). Numeric: S_closed_form.py, S_confluent.py (35-62 digits).

Appendix A: full inclusion-exclusion hand proof (Newton identities minus adjacency corrections; key identity Sigma(bad)=a1 p1-c-t). Step-by-step numeric gate: verify_inclusion_exclusion.py (all 9 links ~1e-54); final gate: verify_clusters.py.

claim: R_n equals the subset-DP independence polynomial exactly for all tested triples and all n; sigma_k -> R_inf.
delta values for nine triples certified >=39 digits each, >=44 for (1,0,1): delta(1,0,1)=0.12385719436062639272850498970259084096757955...
evidence: hp_delta_v2.py, finalize_m2.py (exact downward recurrence, order-3 cluster seed); verify_forward_crosscheck.py (independent ~25-digit cross-check). Data: delta_values_m2.txt.

claim: delta has no low-height elementary closed form; delta is a new transcendental constant of the quadratic family; irrationality open.
evidence: hp_probe.py, pslq_stability.py: identify(V)=None at 100 digits, identify(delta)=None, PSLQ over {1,pi,log2,gamma,Catalan,zeta(3)} max|c|<=200 no relation, R_inf not algebraic deg<=4 height<=1e4; high-height vectors shown precision-unstable (artifacts). A null is a complete honest answer.
